form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Over You carrying 56kg at $3.70. The start before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 2 over 1400m, 2 len behind Sam Barows with 56kg at $3.30. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 31-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 9 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Ryuno Essence carrying 56kg at $8.30. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months won by a nose at this track March 6 over 1400m defeating Shinano Flash carrying 56kg at $12.20.
